description: MCP servers, CLIs, SDKs, IDE plugins, browser extensions, local services, and hosted workflow tools.

items.name: Agent-Skills.md
items.summary: A hosted directory and explorer for AI agent skills that indexes skill repositories, previews SKILL.md instructions, and supports downloading complete skill folders for local use.
use_cases: Discover agent skills by keyword, author, tag, or category before deciding whether to install them.
Preview SKILL.md metadata and instructions from indexed repositories.
Download complete skill folders for local evaluation.
Submit GitHub skill repositories or specific skills folders to be indexed.

links.note: Repository README with purpose, tech stack, and local development commands.
Submit a GitHub URL that points to a repo or skills folder.

risk_notes: Not self-hosted or installed locally as of 2026-06-15.
The directory indexes third-party skills; each discovered skill still needs separate source, permission, and license review before installation.
Downloading a complete skill folder may introduce instructions, scripts, assets, or tooling that can affect future agent behavior.
Search results and popularity metrics are dynamic; verify current repository source before using a skill.
Self-hosting requires Node, pnpm, PostgreSQL, and environment configuration; do not commit secrets from local setup.
No root LICENSE file was found via raw GitHub URL during this review; confirm licensing before modifying or redistributing the site code.

source_review.github_api_status: Unauthenticated API was rate-limited during review; repository page, raw README, raw package.json, and git ls-remote were used.

items.name: SkillsMP
items.summary: A hosted community marketplace and discovery platform for SKILL.md-based agent skills, with keyword search, categories, occupation filters, REST API access, and a streamable HTTP MCP endpoint.
use_cases: Search for candidate agent skills by keyword, category, creator, repository, or SOC occupation.
Use the REST API or MCP endpoint to let agents discover skills programmatically.
Inspect skill detail pages and source GitHub links before deciding whether to track or install a skill.
Browse ecosystem trends, creators, repositories, and occupation-based skill clusters.

links.note: Mission, independence disclaimer, and ecosystem map explanation.

rest_api.anonymous_limits: 50 requests/day and 10 requests/minute for keyword search
rest_api.authenticated_limits: 500 requests/day and 30 requests/minute with free API key

risk_notes: Not self-hosted or installed locally as of 2026-06-15.
The service is an independent community project and states that it is not affiliated with Anthropic or OpenAI.
The marketplace does not guarantee the accuracy, reliability, safety, quality, or functionality of indexed skills; each skill needs separate review before installation.
Indexed skills are sourced from public GitHub repositories and remain subject to their own repository licenses.
Terms prohibit scraping or systematically downloading large portions of the site; use documented API and rate limits instead.
Privacy policy lists usage analytics, device information, cookies, Google Analytics, Microsoft Clarity, and Ahrefs Analytics.
API keys must be stored in a secret manager or environment variable and never committed.
Public pages claim 1.7M+ skills while the MCP manifest mentions 900K+ Claude Code skills; treat counts as dynamic discovery signals, not audited inventory.
